title: CashTransferTypeValues
description:
A transfer where funds are moved and available to the receiver almost immediately.

Comment:
Example:
Sending €50 instantly through mobile banking.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Internal Transfer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A transfer of money between accounts within the same bank.

Comment:
Example:
A customer transfers €500 from a savings account to a checking account in the same bank.

x-enumeration-literals.name: External Transfer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A transfer of funds between accounts in different banks.

Comment:
Example:
Sending €1,000 from Bank A to a friends account in Bank B.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Domestic Transfer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A cash transfer within the same country.

Comment:
Example:
Transferring €200 to a supplier within Belgium.

x-enumeration-literals.name: International Transfer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A transfer of funds between accounts located in different countries.

Comment:
Example:
Sending €2,000 from Belgium to a beneficiary in the United States.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Wire Transfer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
An electronic bank-to-bank transfer of funds through a secure financial network.

Comment:
Example:
A company sends €50,000 to an overseas supplier via wire transfer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standing Order
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Standing Order (Scheduled Transfer) A pre-arranged automatic transfer executed at regular intervals.

Comment:
Example:
A customer transfers €800 monthly for rent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A transfer where the payee automatically collects funds from the payers account with prior authorization.

Comment:
Example:
A utility company automatically deducts €120 monthly for electricity bills.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Remittance Transfer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A transfer of money typically sent by individuals to family or relatives in another location or country.

Comment
Example:
A worker sends €300 to family members abroad.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bulk Transfer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A transfer where multiple payments are processed in a single transaction batch.

Comment:
Example:
A company paying monthly salaries to employees.
